mapper.select: SELECT rp.card_id AS cardId, DATE_FORMAT(rp.scheduled_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS scheduledDate, c.front_content AS frontContent, c.back_content AS backContent, s.subject_name AS subjectName, c.difficulty_level AS difficultyLevel FROM biz_review_plan rp INNER JOIN biz_card c ON rp.card_id = c.card_id AND c.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN biz_subject s ON c.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE rp.user_id = #{userId} AND rp.status = '0' AND rp.scheduled_date <= #{startDate} ORDER BY rp.scheduled_date ASC, rp.card_id ASC

SELECT s.subject_id AS subjectId, s.subject_name AS subjectName, s.major_id AS majorId, m.major_name AS majorName, COUNT(c.card_id) AS totalCards FROM biz_subject s LEFT JOIN biz_major m ON s.major_id = m.major_id LEFT JOIN biz_card c ON s.subject_id = c.subject_id AND c.del_flag = '0' GROUP BY s.subject_id, s.subject_name, s.major_id, m.major_name

SELECT c.subject_id AS subjectId, p.status, COUNT(DISTINCT c.card_id) AS count FROM biz_card c INNER JOIN biz_user_progress p ON c.card_id = p.card_id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND p.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY c.subject_id, p.status
SELECT * FROM biz_review_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND card_id = #{cardId} AND status = '0' ORDER BY scheduled_date DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM biz_review_plan WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND card_id = #{cardId} AND status = '0' ORDER BY scheduled_date DESC LIMIT 1
